'''竏喘-dh-r-y''' ('''kabadhreyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earn|earn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earn|earn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-dh-r-y
|-
! Lemma
| kabadhreyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibadhreyoko|thibadhreyoko]] || [[word:jibadhreyoko|jibadhreyoko]] || [[word:shibadhreyoko|shibadhreyoko]] || [[word:kibadhreyoko|kibadhreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubadhreyoko|thuthubadhreyoko]] || [[word:jujubadhreyoko|jujubadhreyoko]] || [[word:shushubadhreyoko|shushubadhreyoko]] || [[word:kukubadhreyoko|kukubadhreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubadhreyoko|thubadhreyoko]] || [[word:jubadhreyoko|jubadhreyoko]] || [[word:shubadhreyoko|shubadhreyoko]] || [[word:kubadhreyoko|kubadhreyoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobadhreyoko|thothobadhreyoko]] || [[word:jojobadhreyoko|jojobadhreyoko]] || [[word:shoshobadhreyoko|shoshobadhreyoko]] || [[word:kokobadhreyoko|kokobadhreyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobadhreyoko|thobadhreyoko]] || [[word:jobadhreyoko|jobadhreyoko]] || [[word:shobadhreyoko|shobadhreyoko]] || [[word:kobadhreyoko|kobadhreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦbadhreyoko|thﾃｦbadhreyoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦbadhreyoko|jﾃｦbadhreyoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦbadhreyoko|shﾃｦbadhreyoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦbadhreyoko|kﾃｦbadhreyoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabadhreyoko|thabadhreyoko]] || [[word:jabadhreyoko|jabadhreyoko]] || [[word:shabadhreyoko|shabadhreyoko]] || [[word:kabadhreyoko|kabadhreyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
